question: How much is the one-time equipment stipend for a new hire?
ground_truth: Every new hire receives a one-time equipment stipend of $1,500.

question: Which days of the week are designated as core in-office days for local employees?
ground_truth: Tuesdays and Thursdays are designated as core in-office days.

question: How many days per week are employees allowed to work remotely?
ground_truth: Employees at DocuMind are allowed to work remotely up to 3 days per week.

question: How many fully paid wellness days do employees receive per year?
ground_truth: Employees receive 5 fully paid wellness days per year.

question: What options are available for lunch in the main cafeteria at DocuMind?
ground_truth: A catered lunch is served daily at 12:30 PM with vegan, gluten-free, and halal options available.
